pull_request.title: Bump org.openrewrite:rewrite-java-17 from 8.74.1 to 8.74.3
pull_request.body:
Bumps [org.openrewrite:rewrite-java-17](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite) from 8.74.1 to 8.74.3.
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite:rewrite-java-17's releases.

8.74.3

What's Changed

  • Make sure AddToGitignore keeps the newline at the end of the file by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6847
  • Fix JDK 25 IllegalAccessError from module split in JavaUnrestrictedClassLoader by @​mcebanupgrade in openrewrite/rewrite#6836
  • RecipeListing withers now preserve metadata map by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite#6849

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite/compare/v8.74.2...v8.74.3

8.74.2

What's Changed

  • Python: Fix cross-type literal matching in pattern comparator by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6816
  • Python: Enable build cache and Develocity reporting for pytest by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6819
  • JavaScript: Add Develocity test reporting for Jest by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6820
  • Remove maxHeapSize from JavaScriptRewriteRpc.Builder in favor of caller-provided NODE_OPTIONS by @​pdelagrave in openrewrite/rewrite#6803
  • Python: Isolate openrewrite package by version and add recipeInstallDir by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6824
  • Python: Serialize large integers as strings in RPC by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6829
  • Python: Add RPC codecs for PythonResolutionResult marker by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6832
  • JavaScript and Python: unique file names for version.txt files by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#6831
  • Python: Parenthesize template results based on surrounding context by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6827
  • Migrate from services.gradle.org to downloads.gradle.org by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6823
  • Treat literal "null" string as null when reading marketplace CSV by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6826
  • Python: Unwrap ExpressionStatement around block-level template placeholders by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6838
  • RPC: Fix getObject() desync bugs by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6835
  • Python: Unify dev and release bootstrap for openrewrite package by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6839
  • Python: Fix auto_format adding extra indentation on sub-trees by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6842
  • Fix AddDependency bypassing onlyIfUsing with explicit config by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6834
  • Python: Fix template apply losing indentation in nested contexts by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6844
  • UpgradePluginVersion: skip adding version when managed by pluginManagement by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6828

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite/compare/v8.74.1...v8.74.2

Commits
  • 2dd71b1 RecipeListing withers now preserve metadata map (#6849)
  • 6533e0a Fix JDK 25 IllegalAccessError from module split in JavaUnrestrictedClassLoade...
  • d6c7f67 Make sure AddToGitignore keeps the newline at the end of the file (#6847)
  • bd2b80d UpgradePluginVersion: skip adding version when managed by pluginManagement (#...
  • e804713 Python: Fix template apply losing indentation in nested contexts (#6844)
  • c32d382 Fix AddDependency bypassing onlyIfUsing with explicit config (#6834)
  • 82d6e55 Python: Fix auto_format adding extra indentation on sub-trees (#6842)
  • 33ac75a Python: Unify dev and release bootstrap for openrewrite package (#6839)
  • f93dd01 RPC: Fix getObject() desync bugs (#6835)
  • f03fa74 Python: Unwrap ExpressionStatement around block-level template placeholders (...
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view
